Q1.footnote: 1.  State the par value of each share of stock:  Common, $ No Par  per share;  first preferred, $ 350,000 per share;  second preferred, $ None  per share;  debenture stock, $  None  per share.

Q5.footnote: 5.  Has any class or issue of securities any special privileges in the election of directors, trustees or managers or in the determination of corporate action by any method?   No  If so, describe fully in a footnote each such class or issue and give a succinct statement showing clearly the character and extent of such privileges.
